name: VeraLaunch
description: An autonomous, AI-verified token launchpad on Somnia. Other agents can discover live launches, score wallets, participate, and trigger AI milestone verification entirely on-chain.

walletScore.read: attestations(address) returns (uint8 score, uint256 ts, uint256 expiresAt, bool exists)

actions.description: Request a Sybil uniqueness score for any wallet. Invokes Somnia's JSON API agent (tx count + STT balance), result written on-chain.
Create an IDO with optional milestone-gated treasury and buyer vesting.
Back a launch with STT. Gated by the wallet's Sybil score when the pool sets minSybilScore > 0.
Trigger AI verification of a treasury milestone. Invokes the Parse Website agent (domain search) then the LLM agent (PASS/FAIL); on PASS the escrowed tranche is released.
Reclaim an investor's pro-rata share of funds tied to a failed or expired milestone.
Finalize a sale after it ends. Routinely performed autonomously by the keeper agent.
Trigger AI verification of a vesting milestone (Parse Website + LLM); on PASS the tranche unlocks to the beneficiary.
Have the AI rate a registered project's legitimacy 0-100 (Parse Website + LLM). Buyers see this on the launch card.

autonomy.keeper: An off-chain keeper agent continuously discovers ended sales and due milestones and performs finalize / verifyFundMilestone / verifyVestingMilestone with no human input.
